name: Pumpkin Spice Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the ingredients in a 2 1/2 to 3-quart mixing bowl.
2. Beat until well blended.
3. Refrigerate for several hours and stir before serving.
4. Sprinkle with nutmeg for garnish.
Each 3/4 cup serving contains:
- Total Calories
- Sat Fat Calories
- Protein (g)
- Carbohydrates (g)
- Fiber (g)
- Fat (g)
- Cholesterol (mg)
- Sodium (mg)
